title: valeriana minor
intro: Valeriana minor, also known as dwarf valerian or small valerian, is a perennial plant species in the family Valerianaceae. This plant is native to Europe and Asia and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, sedative, and anticonvulsant effects. The health benefits of Valeriana minor include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as pain management and improved sleep quality. Valeriana minor can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
